title: ★ Deep HOF Error Detection
description: GCP traces a missing field through nested HOF composition — error caught at call site, not inside the combinator.

title: ★ Constraint Convergence
description: Two independent functions each constrain a DIFFERENT field of the same entity — GCP merges them into one complete structural type.

title: ★ ADT Dispatch + Structural Inference
description: GCP combines ADT pattern matching with pure structural entity inference — the entity shape is inferred from all access patterns with zero type declarations.

title: ★ Required Field Enforcement
description: GCP distinguishes required fields from default-value and literal-type fields at construction time — missing required fields are caught as type errors.

title: ★ Entity Literal Types
description: An entity literal type pins a field to a fixed entity value — auto-filled at construction, impossible to override.

title: ★ Tuple Literal Types
description: A tuple literal type pins a field to a fixed tuple constant — auto-filled, immutable.

title: ★ External Builder Protocol
description: GCP's __external_builder__ syntax lets runtime plugins construct typed entities — GCP verifies the type at compile time while the plugin supplies the value at runtime.

title: ★ Numeric Default Values
description: Outline field defaults support the full numeric tower — Long literals (1L), negative integers (-1), and negative longs (-1L) are all valid default values.

title: ★ Poly: Role-Based Dispatch
description: A Poly value simultaneously inhabits multiple types. Passing it to a typed function automatically extracts the matching component — natural role-based programming without interfaces.
